nasb.text: He was twenty-five years old when he became king, and he reigned twenty-nine years in Jerusalem. And his mother’s name was Jehoaddin of Jerusalem.

esv.text: He was twenty-five years old when he began to reign, and he reigned twenty-nine years in Jerusalem. His mother’s name was Jehoaddin of Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 他登基的時候是二十五歲，在耶路撒冷作王共二十九年。他母親名叫約耶但，是從耶路撒冷來的。

ccb.text: 他二十五岁登基，在耶路撒冷执政二十九年。他母亲叫约耶但，是耶路撒冷人。
